title: First Movement
brief: Open one file and replace a token using normal-mode navigation.
hints: Open the file with nvim workspace/notes.txt.
Type /navigation_ready and press Enter to jump to the target word.
Best-fit command: on that word, type gUiw to uppercase the full word.
Fallback: use ciw, enter NAVIGATION_READY, then press Esc.
fallback_path: On the target word, use `ciw`, type `NAVIGATION_READY`, press `Esc`.
why_path: `gUiw` matches the stage goal exactly (uppercase this word) with fewer keystrokes and less chance of typos.
pro_move: Search + change word is often faster than arrowing around.
